mapper.sql: select d.directory_id as directoryId, d.project_id as projectId, p.project_name as projectName, d.parent_id as parentId, d.template_id as templateId, d.directory_code as directoryCode, d.directory_name as directoryName, d.directory_level as directoryLevel, d.directory_type as directoryType, d.full_path as fullPath, d.required_flag as requiredFlag, d.compliance_status as complianceStatus, d.archive_status as archiveStatus, d.sort_order as sortOrder, d.create_by as createBy, d.create_time as createTime, d.update_by as updateBy, d.update_time as updateTime, d.remark from inf_project_space_directory d left join inf_project p on p.project_id = d.project_id
mapper.select: where d.project_id = #{projectId} order by d.directory_level asc, d.sort_order asc, d.directory_id asc
select count(1) from inf_project_space_directory where project_id = #{projectId} and required_flag = '1'
